body:

[Gov. Kasich will need your help during this evening's CNN Presidential Debate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420943:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r) to make sure that we get information out about how people can join the team and get involved.

**Here are a few ways that you can help today before and during the debate:**

**1.** Please visit [JohnKasich.com/Debate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420944:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r) and use this page as a resource for what to share, what hashtags to use in social media posts and other ways that you can show your support.

**
**2.** [Consider chipping in $25 or more to ensure that we have the resources we'll need](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420945:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r) to introduce Gov. Kasich to primary voters and win their support.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420946:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r)

**3.** Follow Gov. Kasich on Twitter: [@JohnKasich](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420947:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r) and [Facebook (here)](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420948:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r) so you can share our posts tonight.

**4.** Finally, remind your friends and family to tune in to watch the debate this evening and encourage them to signup for our email updates! [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30420949:W3t5D7mrN:m:1:958431888:4DADC4A0991CF3F1E51063728AB946CA:r)

Thank you for your help!

**Kevin Bingle**
Digital Director**

name: Doug Stafford, Rand Paul for President
subject: Rand’s Debate Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Memorandum

To: Supporters
From: Doug Stafford, Chief Strategist
Chip Englander, Campaign Manager

Re: Debate Strategy
Date: September 16, 2015

Tonight we've purchased advertising in Iowa and New Hampshire for
the presidential debate. Our internal
polling shows 85% of caucus and primary voters in these states
will tune-in tonight.

This ad lays out Senator Paul's debate game plan; the two big
points he'll make tonight.

1. He's the candidate with the biggest, boldest tax and budget
proposals. He's the only candidate with
a flat tax that would gut the IRS and eliminate special deals for
Wall Street. He's the only candidate
who's actually authored a plan to balance the budget that
eliminates $500 billion IN ONE YEAR and
abolishes cabinet departments. He understands no matter which
party is in power, government and debt have grown - and he'll
fight them.

2. He's the candidate who wants term limits to get rid of career
politicians in both parties. He understands the Washington
Machine has created a country run by
lobbyists for special interests, and politicians in both parties
let it happen. We need to require Congress to
read the bills before they vote on them. Congress should
live under the same laws the American people do.

Taxes, debt, and a corrupt culture in Washington is what animates
the election. They're the very issues that drive Rand Paul.

And it's the message he will deliver tonight.

Watch the TV ad for yourself:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rL6iR1pKAVs

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: CNN debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Dear Peter,

I'm writing you from the
Ronald Reagan Presidential Library, where at 8 PM ET tonight
Marco will join 10 other candidates for the Republican debate on
CNN. In addition to watching it on TV, you can join our debate
team online at marcorubio.com/debate for real-time analysis,
fact-checks, and video clips during the debate.

At the first debate in
Cleveland last month, millions of Americans got their first look
at Marco - and they really liked what they saw. Marco talked
about how his parents achieved the American Dream and declared,
"If I am the nominee, the Republican Party will be the party of
the future." Expect more of the same tonight.

While our campaign has had
a great couple of weeks since the first debate, the same cannot
be said of the other candidates. We expect some of them will
attack each other in hopes of turning around their faltering
campaigns. Marco doesn't need to do that. He isn't coming to the
Reagan Library to attack other Republicans.

Marco is going to talk
about how this election is about what kind of country we will be
in the 21st Century. We're headed in the wrong direction -
Washington is stuck in the past. What we need now is a leader
like Marco who has new ideas for a New American Century. That's
what tonight's debate is about.

Sincerely,

Terry Sullivan

Campaign Manager

P.S. Please be sure to
check out marcorubio.com/debate tonight for analysis, real-time
fact-checking, and video clips.

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: SIGN: Stop the shutdown threats
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Once again, partisans in Washington are putting politics above the needs of Pennsylvanians. **Congressional Republicans are just days away from shutting down our entire government, all for the sake of restricting women 's access to healthcare.**

**[Join Katie and demand that Republicans in Congress end the political gridlock and stop using the threat of a shutdown to force their extremist agenda on our country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3877143982567849984/-3542061315717595136?ms=20150916e)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3877143982567849984/-3542061315717595136?ms=20150916e)
---

Republicans like Pat Toomey may think it's acceptable to play politics with women's health, but for the millions of women and men who depend on Planned Parenthood as their only source of affordable medical care, this is not a game.

**We shouldn 't be surprised Pat Toomey is in on these shutdown threats, considering his abysmal record on women's health.** Toomey has twice voted to defund Planned Parenthood and said he would support repealing _Roe v. Wade_. He even voted in favor of the Blunt Amendment, which would have allowed employers to pick and choose the services covered under their health insurance based on their own religious beliefs.

**[Sign your name and send a message to Senator Toomey and his Republican friends in Congress: Pennsylvanians won't stand for these shutdown threats or attacks on women's health anymore!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3877143982567849984/-3542061315717595136?ms=20150916e)**

Pat Toomey cares more about Republican politics than about his constituents. Pennsylvanians need a Senator like Katie McGinty, who will put people ahead of partisan politics and fight to make sure that women and families aren't the ones paying the price for political gamesmanship.

Thanks for standing with us,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager

| | Peter, We are going to roll back government overreach and restore our freedoms. How do I know? Because of one incredible young lady who is the newest face of Americans for Prosperity's National Day of Action. Meet Rachel. Rachel is one of our newest volunteers, and just like many of you, she was reluctant when we asked her to help us by calling her fellow Virginians. Last month during our Day of Action, this new volunteer - in a single day -made over 700 calls. This 17 year-old rock star was nervous to volunteer, but she ended up leading the entire state in calls. She connected with many Virginians and educated them about freedom. Rachel is why the cause of liberty can win. She chose to help with dozens of others last Day of Action, and will join dozens more this Saturday. Will you [join her?](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5c55c2fa2586011df1f324d0d6ab2677a83d7f2cfa088971228e1a93fb8fd26a984a10e7dd62e646) A new day of economic freedom is coming in Virginia, and it's because people statewide are giving several hours at least once a month at our National Day of Action. They are connecting with thousands of Virginians and bringing freedom and prosperity to our communities. Now is the time to make the choice to be at Day of Action! Go to [www.iamafp.com](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5c55c2fa2586011df1f324d0d6ab2677a83d7f2cfa088971228e1a93fb8fd26a984a10e7dd62e646) or contact your Field Director below and let them know you're ready to join Rachel.

See you, Rachel, and dozens more this Saturday!Ben Knotts

Any political hack worth their salt will tell you -- you don't win or lose elections when everyone's tuned in at the big moments right before folks go to the polls. You win them in the crucial foundational moments of a campaign, when the die-hards are doing the hard work of building a winning organization.

We’re in one of those moments right now.

**[It's critical for you to step up and pitch in $1 or more to elect Hillary Clinton right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1MjQ1NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNjQyMDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

And we're going to talk to voters about the issues they care about -- not whatever hot-button story the media is focused on during any particular news cycle.

Unlike our Republican opponents, we're not counting on billionaires to do all the work for us. We’re relying on a grassroots-powered organization that supporters like you help build.

Robby

Before tonight's debate: | Friend -- Some people are going to tune in to the debate tonight to laugh at the Republicans -- to see what kind of fight Trump's going to get in with the moderator, that sort of thing.

But here's the truth: These candidates are scary. They're serious. And they have a legitimately galling amount of money behind them to misrepresent their policies and smear anyone who might disagree with them.

[**It 's not enough to sit back and laugh -- we've got to fight back with the facts. Sign up for The Briefing today, and get the info you need to hold the GOP accountable.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM1MjU3MjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNjUxNjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Hillary Clinton is the only candidate who understands what it's going to take to beat these Republicans, and they know that -- that's why you see them leveling attack after attack at her.

**It 's going to be hard work to fight back, and Hillary needs your help. If you're in, add your name to join The Briefing before tonight's debate:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/get-the-briefing/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM1MjU3MjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNjUxNjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Christina

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Marco did it again. He cleaned up at another debate tonight with his crisp, on point, conservative answers. While the other candidates took Jake Tapper's bait to attack each other, Marco stood out for his clear, principled plans to confront the greatest threats to our nation. That's why we saw a surge of new support online even before the debate was over. Now we need to build on this moment by raising as much money as possible for our campaign in the next 24 hours. In case you didn't see the debate, this is the highlight that you can't miss: | | | Marco is running for president because there is a massive disconnect between the American people and our government in Washington. Marco won the debate by forcefully arguing that it will never get any better if we keep sending people to Washington who will say and do anything just to get elected. America needs a president who will stand up for our conservative values, not sacrifice them. A president who will inspire our country, not divide it. Tonight, with a winning debate performance and , Marco is one step closer to being that president. Sincerely, Terry Sullivan Campaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President P.S. Marco won the debate. name: Team Jeb
subject: Did you hear that?
body:
Friend -

Did you hear that? That's the sound of Democrats hitting the panic button after Jeb won the debate tonight.

Jeb proved his vision and message can win. That has Democrats very worried because they know if Jeb is the nominee, Hillary is in BIG trouble.

The momentum is on our side after tonight's debate, but we still have a lot of work to ensure Jeb is standing on the stage accepting the GOP nomination in 2016.

[**That 's why we're launching our Debate Response Fund and if you chip in $10 or more before midnight Friday, we'll sweeten the pot and send you a limited-edition Jeb! 2016 wristband.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ygvryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwsbkgq_jmqvvfns.html)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xbslkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydjrbp_jmqvvfns.html)

The next 48 hours are critical for the campaign. The Governor did an amazing job, but we're fighting against the spin artists. Unless we can show that our supporters are behind him, all of this momentum will be lost.

That's why it's so important for you to chip in $10 or more right now. Remember, a gift of $10 or more gets you a Jeb! 2016 wristband. **Get yours now:[Jeb2016.com/Debate-Response-Fund/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ygbryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwsbkgk_jmqvvfns.html)**

We need you now, Friend. Jeb needs you now.

**We 're one step closer to taking on Hillary in 2016, we need you to take the next. Jeb did his part, it's time for you to do yours. Chip in $10 or more to our Debate Response Fund now: [Jeb2016.com/Debate-Response-Fund/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mddgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcbndd_jmqvvfns.html)

\--Team Jeb**
